title: Supreme Court flags shortage of public prosecutors, asks States to make appointments during vacation
description: The Supreme Court on Friday said shortage of public prosecutors was one of the major reasons behind delays in criminal trials and urged State governments to immediately fill vacancies [Dolubhai Vihabhai Gohil v. State of Gujarat]A Bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan made the observations while granting bail to an accused booked under the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act (NDPS Act).“You say that there is delay in criminal justice dispensation in the country. You ask us,
